Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix fuzz test timeout handling in CI (#49)

Change fuzz tests from time-based limits to iteration-based limits to
avoid "context deadline exceeded" errors in Go 1.26.1. When the fuzz
time limit is reached without finding bugs, Go 1.26.1 exits with status 1
instead of 0, causing false positives in CI.

Using an iteration count (100000x) is more deterministic and avoids the
issue entirely - the fuzzer exits cleanly after completing the specified
number of iterations.

commit.message:
Add markdown vault for long-term memory

Replaces SQLite memory table with human-readable markdown files in vault/.
Vault contains memory.md, people.md, preferences.md, health.md, projects.md
and is gitignored (personal data). Seraph reads all vault files into the
system prompt on every request; remember/recall/forget tools route to the
appropriate file based on key content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix 15 bugs and add 6 proactive automation features

Bug fixes: onboarding→config disconnect, .env loading, scheduler last_run,
chat double-message, plist hardcoded paths, Makefile typo, oneshot heuristic,
dead code removal (tools/, BrowserManager), markdown rendering, input
sanitization, CSRF protection, runner UnboundLocalError, deprecated utcnow.

New features:
- Memory system: SQLite-backed context that persists across sessions
- Health checks + watchdog: /api/health endpoint with Telegram alerts
- Emergency stop: /api/estop + Telegram /stop to halt all tasks
- Webhook ingestion: /api/webhook/{name} for external service triggers
- Agent delegation: orchestrator.delegate() for multi-agent workflows
- Tool approval: require_approval flag with Telegram confirmation flow

115 tests passing (21 new).

commit.message:
feat: openclaw-qq-onebot with voice support

QQ channel plugin for OpenClaw via NapCat (OneBot v11).

Features:
- Text, image, and voice message handling
- Voice recognition (SILK → WAV via pilk → STT)
- Voice reply (TTS → WAV → SILK, sent with text)
- CLI-based OpenClaw API invocation
- Configurable voice paths (ttsToolPath, qqDataDir, cacheDir)
- macOS QQ sandbox compatibility

Based on @creatoraris/openclaw-qq v0.2.0.

- PublicPage.tsx — uses shared modules, lightbox expanded to all media types
- home/page.tsx — uses shared upload + aspect modules (-229 lines)
- build/page.tsx — uses shared extractYouTubeId + isVideoFile

Phase 5: AddTileSheet component
- Unified add-content surface with URL paste, file upload, thought input
- Real-time platform detection as user types

Net: 8 new files, 4 modified, ~380 lines of duplication removed

feat: upgrade Python reference agent to L3 CONFORMANT (31/31)

Extends the independent Python implementation from L1 (13 vectors) to full L3
(31 vectors). Implements the complete tool execution pipeline (quota → policy →
sandbox → exists → approval → execute with timeout), memory (store/query/compact),
and swarm (delegate/discover/report/broadcast) — all in ~350 lines of stdlib-only
Python. Zero SDK dependencies, proving CKP is fully language-agnostic.

commit.message:
Add Capability Achievements section to README

Documents the four major capability unlocks with technical depth and
concrete attack/research implications: tcpdump via inittab escape,
iptables mangle/NAT daemon with QCMAP-safe chain architecture, shadow
authentication suite deployment, and wpa_supplicant concurrent AP+STA
mode. Each section covers the technical barrier, the solution, and what
the capability actually enables in practice.

commit.message:
feat: CodeBakers v5.0.0 - MCP Foundation + Self-Aware System

MAJOR MILESTONE: Complete architecture for CodeBakers Method implementation

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
WHAT'S NEW IN v5.0.0
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

1. MCP SERVER ARCHITECTURE (Complete)
   - Full TypeScript MCP server implementation
   - 11 tools registered and callable
   - Stdio transport for Claude Code integration
   - Error handling and request routing

2. SELF-AWARE CONTEXT SYSTEM ✨ (Fully Implemented)
   - codebakers_get_context: Auto-detects project state
   - Identifies current phase (0-6)
   - Detects blockers automatically
   - Generates proactive suggestions
   - Calculates progress percentage
   - NO USER COMMANDS NEEDED - system guides automatically

3. SESSION INITIALIZATION PROTOCOL (Fully Implemented)
   - codebakers_init_session: Loads BUILD-STATE.md
   - Establishes project context
   - Loads phase-specific artifacts
   - Confirms verification gates
   - Implements CodeBakers Method session protocol

4. CODEBAKERS METHOD INTEGRATION
   - Complete 7-phase workflow structure
   - BUILD-STATE.md for session resume
   - PROJECT-SPEC.md for scope boundaries
   - Phase gates for quality enforcement
   - Comprehensive dependency mapping (Phase 2 enhancement)

5. CLAUDE.md v5.0.0 (Redesigned)
   - Reduced from 1200 lines to ~320 lines
   - MCP tool integration instructions
   - Proactive guidance examples
   - Self-aware system protocol
   - Hard rules (stack, security)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
FILES CREATED
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

MCP Server (codebakers-mcp-server/):
✓ package.json - MCP server configuration
✓ tsconfig.json - TypeScript configuration
✓ README.md - Comprehensive documentation (350+ lines)
✓ src/index.ts - MCP server entry point (190 lines)

Fully Implemented Tools:
✓ src/tools/get-context.ts - Context detection (405 lines)
✓ src/tools/init-session.ts - Session init (234 lines)

Stub Tools (Registered, Need Implementation):
○ src/tools/generate-spec.ts - Phase 0: Spec generation
○ src/tools/analyze-mockups.ts - Phase 2: Deep mockup analysis
○ src/tools/generate-schema.ts - Phase 2: Schema generation
○ src/tools/map-dependencies.ts - Phase 2: Dependency mapping
○ src/tools/generate-store-contracts.ts - Phase 2: Store contracts

○ src/tools/check-scope.ts - Scope enforcement

WHAT'S WORKING NOW
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

✅ MCP server compiles and runs
✅ Context detection fully operational

✅ Tested with Claude Code - CONFIRMED WORKING
✅ Auto-detects project state (new/existing/phase)
✅ Auto-identifies blockers

USER EXPERIENCE:
User types: "hi"
System auto-detects state and responds:
"🍞 CodeBakers: Hello! New project detected.
 Phase: 0 (Spec Generation)
 Next: Tell me what you want to build"

NO COMMANDS NEEDED. NO MANUAL SETUP. JUST WORKS.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
WHAT NEEDS TO BE COMPLETED
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Priority 1 - Phase 2 Tools (CRITICAL):
□ analyze-mockups-deep: Extract data from mockups
□ generate-schema: Generate SQL from mockup analysis
□ map-dependencies: Map ALL dependencies (read/write/cascades)
□ generate-store-contracts: Generate store contracts

Priority 2 - Phase 0 & Enforcement:
□ generate-spec: Generate PROJECT-SPEC.md (Gates 0-5)
□ enforce-feature: Build with full atomic unit protocol
□ check-scope: Verify feature in PROJECT-SPEC.md
□ fix-commit: Auto-fix git violations
□ check-gate: Verify phase completion

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ARCHITECTURE DECISIONS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

1. MCP as Foundation (Not Add-On)
   - All enforcement through MCP tools
   - CLAUDE.md becomes lightweight
   - Technical enforcement, not instructions

2. Self-Aware Context System
   - Auto-detects project state
   - Proactive suggestions
   - User doesn't need to know the Method

3. Comprehensive Dependency Mapping
   - Map ALL dependencies in Phase 2
   - BEFORE any code is written
   - Zero stale UI bugs from moment 1

4. CodeBakers Method Integration
   - Full 7-phase workflow
   - BUILD-STATE.md for session resume
   - PROJECT-SPEC.md for scope
   - Phase gates for quality

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
INSTALLATION & TESTING
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Build:
  cd codebakers-mcp-server
  npm install
  npm run build

Configure Claude Code:
  Add to claude_desktop_config.json:
  {
    "mcpServers": {
      "codebakers": {
        "command": "node",
        "args": ["[path]/codebakers-mcp-server/dist/index.js"]
      }
    }
  }

Test:
  1. Restart Claude Code
  2. Open any project
  3. Type: "hi"
  4. Watch context-aware response

commit.message:
Replace flickering status phases with stable "Transcribing" indicator

The old StatusBadgeView cycled through Uploading/Waiting/Processing on
a timer and reset on view reappear, causing confusing status flicker
on long transcriptions. Since the Mistral API is a single synchronous
POST with no progress callback, replace with a stable spinner +
"Transcribing" label.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: reset drag refs in onDrop to prevent clicks from breaking

After a cross-lane drag, the optimistic re-render unmounts the dragged
element before onDragEnd fires, leaving didDragRef stuck as true and
blocking all subsequent card clicks. Reset both refs in onDrop where
cleanup is guaranteed to run.

commit.message:
Add Ground Intelligence: Mapillary CV + satellite vision + AI narrative

Three new intelligence layers that go beyond database-sourced metrics to
capture what walking actually feels like on the ground:

1. /api/mapillary — fetches pre-computed Mapillary CV detections (crossings,
   lighting, signals, bike infra) + street photo thumbnails for display
2. /api/satellite-vision — fetches Esri World Imagery tile at zoom 16,
   sends to Claude Sonnet vision to assess parking, street width, building
   density, greenery, and urban pattern
3. /api/ground-reality — Claude Sonnet synthesizes all signals (OSM +
   Mapillary + satellite) into a 3-4 sentence narrative paragraph + 3
   key insights + confidence rating

New GroundRealityCard component renders below PersonaCards with skeleton
loading, Mapillary photo strip, satellite detail row, and source badges.
All fetches are non-blocking progressive enhancements.
